events.title: South Florida Symphony: Summer with the Symphony Chamber Music Concert
events.description: Enjoy an intimate candlelit chamber music experience as piano, violin, and cello come together in a program featuring works by Louise Farrenc and Dora Pejačević. The evening also includes a complimentary beverage and an opportunity to meet the musicians at Books & Books next door. CGM Friends receive $10 off general admission tickets with promo code CGMUSEUM

events.title: Thievery Corporation
events.description: , the Washington, D.C. duo of Rob Garza and Eric Hilton, are pioneers of genre-defying electronic music. Since their 1996 debut Sounds from the Thievery Hi-Fi , they’ve blended downtempo, dub, bossa nova, reggae, jazz, and global influences into a signature sound. events.title: FYE ULTRACLUB PRESENTS: E11EVEN MIAMI FUTBOL26 POP-OFF SERIES: THEMBA
Lincoln Road Farmer’s Market
events.description: On Meridian Avenue through Washington Avenue, local vendors gather along Lincoln Road to sell fruits, vegetables, fresh-cut flowers and more. Rain or shine, guests are welcome to explore the area to find regional treasures. Every Sunday at 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM on Lincoln Road.

G-EAZY AT E11EVEN FOURTH OF JULY
July 4th Spectacular at Tropical Park
events.description: Miami-Dade County's largest County-supported Fourth of July celebration, presented in partnership with Univision: live musical performances, DJs, food vendors, family-friendly activities, patriotic fun, and an evening fireworks show.
events.sourceName: Miami-Dade July 4th Spectacular at Tropical Park

events.title: 4th of July Celebration: North Beach
events.description: Starting at 5 PM dance to live music and let the kids have fun in the family zone. Music performances take the stage with entertainment by DJ Luc, MC Maria Salas and The Miami Beats Band. events.title: July 4th Roller Disco
events.description: Join us and our skate hosts, All Skates Go To Heaven, and DJs Kumi & Zac, to Celebrate Independence Day with a spin around the Bandshell!
